items.label: Getting Started
items.content:
# ZYNQ

## Installation

ZYNQ is a WebRTC + games framework.
It combines peer-to-peer communication with a game library system.

No backend required.

items.label: Script Tag
items.content:
# ZYNQ

## Script Tag

Loads ZYNQ globally into `window.ZYNQ`.

```html
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/un-zynq/zynq-lib@1.1.1/index.min.js"></script>
```

After loading:
```js
window.ZYNQ
```

items.label: ES Module
items.content:
# ZYNQ

## ES Module (Side Effect Import)

This version does NOT export bindings. It only initializes global `window.ZYNQ`.

```js
import "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/un-zynq/zynq-lib@1.1.1/index.min.js"
```

After import:
```js
window.ZYNQ.Peer
window.ZYNQ.games
```

items.label: Game Object
items.content:
# ZYNQ

## ZYNQ Games
### Game Object Structure

Represents a single game entry.

```ts
Game {
  name: string,
  alias: string,
  url: string,
  thumb: string,
  category?: string,
  devices?: number[],

  isSupported: boolean,
  isFavorite: boolean
}
```

Example:
```js
{
  name: "Alien Hominid",
  alias: "alien-hominid",
  url: "arcade/alien-hominid",
  thumb: "https://cdn/...",
  category: "shooter"
}
```

items.label: State & Properties
items.content:
# ZYNQ

## ZYNQ.games
### State & Properties

```ts
config: {
  src: string,
  cdn: string
}

all: Game[]
filtered: Game[]
favorites: Set<string>
deviceType: number
history: string[]
```

### Getters
```ts
list: Game[]
total: number
filteredCount: number
```

children.label: .init()
children.content:
# ZYNQ

## ZYNQ.games
### init(options?)
Loads full game database from CDN.

```js
await ZYNQ.games.init()
```

children.label: .search()
children.content:
# ZYNQ

## ZYNQ.games
### search(query)
Filters games by name or alias.

```js
ZYNQ.games.search("alien")
```

children.label: .random()
children.content:
# ZYNQ

## ZYNQ.games
### random(limit)
Returns random subset.

```js

```

children.label: History API
children.content:
# ZYNQ

## ZYNQ.games
### History API

#### addToHistory(alias)
```js

```

#### getHistory()
```js
ZYNQ.games.getHistory()
```

#### clearHistory()
```js
ZYNQ.games.clearHistory()
```

items.label: Constructor
items.content:
# ZYNQ

## ZYNQ.Peer
### Constructor

```js
const peer = new ZYNQ.Peer({
  video: true,
  audio: true,
  txt: true
})
```

children.label: .connect()
children.content:
# ZYNQ

## ZYNQ.Peer
### connect(peerId)
```js
peer.connect("abc-123")
```

children.label: .send()
children.content:
# ZYNQ

## ZYNQ.Peer
### send(peerId, data)
```js
peer.send("abc-123", "hello")
```

children.label: .call()
children.content:
# ZYNQ

## ZYNQ.Peer
### call(peerId, options)
```js
peer.call("abc-123", { video: true, audio: true })
```

# ZYNQ

## ZYNQ.Peer
### hangup(peerId)
